features.description: Skills: Choose two from History, Persuasion, and Religion

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: On your turn, you can take a bonus action to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your fighter level.

features.name: Combat Superiority
features.description: You gain the combat superiority fighting style. You can use opportunity attacks without provoking additional attacks from the target.

features.name: Maneuvering Attack
features.description: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can deal an extra 2d6 damage to it if it is within 5 feet of another enemy of yours that isn't incapacitated.
